---
title: "Categorize Personnel"
format: html
---

# Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(arrow)

options(scipen = 12, digits = 12)

path_data <- Sys.getenv("PATH_DATA")
year_fiscal <- Sys.getenv("YEAR_FISCAL")
```

# Import

```{r}
#| eval: false

categorization_prev <-
  read_excel("data/personnel_2023.xlsx", col_types = "text") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    across(position, \(x) str_pad(x, width = 8, side = "left", pad = "0"))
  ) %>%
  distinct(costcenter, position, categorization_prev = position_type) %>%
  arrange(costcenter, position, categorization_prev)

categorization_sp <-
  read_excel(
    glue(
      "{path_working}/Categorization by Cost Center, Program 2, Program.xlsx"
    ),
    col_types = "text"
  ) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(costcenter, program_2, program, categorization_sp)

categorization_override <-
  read_excel(
    glue(
      "{path_working}/Override Personnel.xlsx"
    ),
    col_types = "text"
  ) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  filter(!is.na(categorization_override)) %>%
  distinct(costcenter, position, categorization_override)
```

Personnel

```{r}
personnel <- read_parquet(glue("{path_data}/working/personnel_clean.parquet"))
```

```{r}
personnel_categorization <-
  read_excel(
    glue("{path_data}/manual/personnel_categorization.xlsx"),
    col_types = c(
      rep("text", 1),
      rep("logical", 4),
      rep("text", 4),
      rep("logical", 2),
      rep("text", 4),
      rep("numeric", 3)
    )
  )

personnel_categorization <-
  personnel_categorization |>
  mutate(
    categorization = sample(c("Direct", "Indirect"), size = n(), replace = TRUE)
  )

headcomponent <-
  read_excel(
    glue("{path_data}/manual/headcomponent.xlsx"),
    col_types = c(rep("logical", 2), rep("text", 11))
  ) |>
  select(
    costcenter_id, program_id, position_id, employee_id,
    is_executive, is_headcomponent
  )
```

# Categorize

```{r}
personnel_categorized <-
  personnel |>
  anti_join(
    personnel_categorization,
    by = join_by(costcenter_id, program_id, position_id, employee_id)
  ) |>
  mutate(categorization = case_when(
    is_all_direct ~ "Direct",
    is_all_indirect ~ "Indirect",
    is_mixed & position_is_direct ~ "Direct",
  )) |>
  bind_rows(personnel_categorization) |>
  left_join(
    headcomponent,
    by = join_by(costcenter_id, program_id, position_id, employee_id)
  ) |>
  mutate(headcomponent = case_when(
    is_executive ~ "Executive",
    is_headcomponent ~ "Head of component",
    .default = "Non-executive"
  )) |>
  arrange(
    costcenter_name, program_name, headcomponent, position_id, employee_id
  )

personnel_categorized
```

# Transform

```{r}
personnel_categorized <-
  personnel_categorized %>%
  mutate(
    amt_direct = if_else(categorization == "Direct", amt_total, 0.00),
    amt_indirect = if_else(categorization == "Indirect", amt_total, 0.00),
    amt_unrestricted = if_else(headcomponent == "Non-executive", amt_total, 0.00),
    amt_headcomponent_direct = if_else(headcomponent != "Non-executive" & categorization == "Direct", amt_total, 0),
    amt_headcomponent_indirect = if_else(headcomponent != "Non-executive" & categorization == "Indirect", amt_total, 0),
    amt_headcomponent_total = if_else(headcomponent != "Non-executive", amt_total, 0),
    amt_terminal_to_indirect = if_else(categorization == "Direct" & headcomponent == "Non-executive", amt_terminal, 0),
    amt_terminal_restricted = if_else(headcomponent != "Non-executive", amt_terminal, 0)
  )

personnel_categorized
```

Every cost center, position group is associated with only 1 categorization.

PASS

```{r}
data_485_aug %>%
  distinct(costcenter, position, categorization) %>%
  count(costcenter, position, sort = T) %>%
  filter(n > 1)
```

Cost centers with only 1 categorization.

```{r}
personnel %>%
  distinct(costcenter_name_clean, categorization) %>%
  count(costcenter_name_clean, sort = TRUE) %>%
  filter(n == 1) %>%
  select(costcenter_name_clean) %>%
  left_join(personnel) %>%
  count(costcenter_name_clean, costcenter_clean, categorization)
```

Cost centers with more than 1 categorization.

```{r}
personnel %>%
  filter(costcenter != "10002") %>%
  distinct(costcenter_name_clean, categorization) %>%
  count(costcenter_name_clean, sort = TRUE) %>%
  filter(n > 1) %>%
  select(costcenter_name_clean) %>%
  left_join(personnel) %>%
  count(costcenter_name_clean, costcenter_clean, categorization)
```

```{r}
Sys.time()
```
